text:
Sony cybershot DSC-H2 not recognized (again)

Mar 11 05:13:05 pop1 kernel: umass1:  RBC over CBI; quirks = 0x0000
Mar 11 05:13:05 pop1 kernel: umass1:5:1:-1: Attached to scbus5
Mar 11 05:13:15 pop1 kernel: (probe0:umass-sim1:1:0:0): INQUIRY. CDB: 12 0 0 0 24 0 
Mar 11 05:13:15 pop1 kernel: (probe0:umass-sim1:1:0:0): CAM status: Auto-Sense Retrieval Failed
Mar 11 05:13:15 pop1 kernel: (probe0:umass-sim1:1:0:0): Error 5, Unretryable error
